_comment: this has been taken from https://set09102-api.b-davison.workers.dev/openapi.json - i have added openapi.json at the end and pasted it in the json file to be able to see in a friendly way how the code looks like, this file has not been changed in any other way, only for my own personal learnings'

info.title: SET09102 Library of Things API
info.description: Shared REST API for the SET09102 'Library of Things' coursework. Students connect their .NET MAUI apps to this hosted endpoint — no SSH tunnel required.

get.summary: View public profile of a user
Get all reviews for an item
List incoming rental requests (for items I own)
List outgoing rental requests (items I want to rent)
Get rental details (owner or borrower only)

post.summary: Submit a review for a completed rental

get.summary: Get all reviews for a user (as owner)
